case_title: SABINAH T. LOPEZ VS. ANOSH M. DUMASIA

docket_entries.description: DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # A5624917D007, TAG # 037745 BY DEFENDANT DUMASIA, ANOSH M.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT DUMASIA, ANOSH M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-16-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, SABINAH T.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-16-2024 BY DAWN PAYNE. PLAINTIFF SABINAH T. LOPEZ IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ANOSH DUMASIA IS PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM. THE COURT ALLOWS THE EXCHANGE OF EXHIBITS VIA TEXT. PLAINTIFF AUTHORIZES THE CLERK TO SIGN JPT STIP ON HER BEHALF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT OF HIS NEW ADDRESS. (SEE NOTES) JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWNE PAYNE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (506/JPT)

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUMASIA, ANOSH M. $1,357.62 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,447.62, $300 A MOTNH STARTING ON SEPT. 16, 2024 UNTIL PAID OFF.
